title: Issue with Google Drive extension
excerpt:

posts.author: melle-tom-orrow (Melle Meijer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Goodmorning,

I was playing around with the add file via DropBox/Google Drive feature. We use specific folder structures to store/work on files for projects. And with the recent start of using Monday, people were getting lost where to find files.

DropBox looks ok, with finding files within the file structure we use (in the popup that opens). Only downside is images don’t appear to be shown in the file gallery.

But adding a file from Google, I can’t seem to to be able to list the Google Drive folder structure in the popup that opens:

image1530×1210 101 KB

What am I doing wrong?

posts.author: UmbriaSp (K M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Same problem here.
@Melle, did you work out a solution?

posts.author: melle-tom-orrow (Melle Meijer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello K M UmbriaSp,

Haven’t looked into this anymore. We moved away from the Google Drive approach.

Kind regards,
Melle
